goal: Implement the login and token refresh flow — AuthService for credential validation and token management, DTOs, and REST endpoints on AuthController.

tasks.name: Create auth DTOs (LoginRequest, LoginResponse, RefreshTokenRequest)
tasks.action: Create 3 Java record DTOs: LoginRequest(username, password) with @NotBlank, LoginResponse(accessToken, refreshToken, tokenType, expiresIn), RefreshTokenRequest(refreshToken) with @NotBlank.

tasks.name: Create AuthService with authenticate and refreshAccessToken
tasks.action: Create AuthService @Service: authenticate() validates credentials via SaccoUserDetailsService + PasswordEncoder, generates JWT via JwtService, persists RefreshToken (7d expiry). refreshAccessToken() validates refresh token, rotates (revoke old + create new), returns new LoginResponse.

tasks.name: Extend AuthController with login and refresh endpoints
tasks.action: Add POST /api/auth/login and POST /api/auth/refresh to existing AuthController. Handle BadCredentialsException (401), DisabledException/LockedException (403). Use ApiResponse wrapper.
verify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q

planVerify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q
commitMessage: feat(custom-auth-api): add AuthService with login and token refresh endpoints
